description: Style Note Spring Summer 2012 saw statement accessories steal the show on ramps. Now bring this trend to your wardrobe with this stylish french connection wallet, crafted from superior materials. Pair these with unlikely pieces in your wardrobe be it pastel hues or colour pops. Product Details Black wallet with metal studs all over Has one main zipped compartment with a zipped separator, has eight card holder slots and two slip pockets Fabric inner Material and Care Polyurethane Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size  Height: 11 cm Width: 19 cm Depth: 2 cm
